title: I Need Thee Every Hour
firstLine: I need Thee every hour, most gracious Lord
publicDomainBasis: Annie S. Hawks (1835–1918), Robert Lowry (1826–1899). Written and published 1872. Both public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
I need Thee every hour,
Most gracious Lord;
No tender voice like Thine
Can peace afford.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
I need Thee, O I need Thee;
Every hour I need Thee!
O bless me now, my Savior,
I come to Thee.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
I need Thee every hour,
Stay Thou nearby;
Temptations lose their power
When Thou art nigh.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
I need Thee every hour,
In joy or pain;
Come quickly and abide,
Or life is vain.

sections.label: Verse 4
Verse 5
sections.text:
I need Thee every hour,
Most Holy One;
O make me Thine indeed,
Thou blessed Son.
